product_overview: A comprehensive hotel management platform that facilitates efficient room and booking management, real-time tape chart visualizations, multi-property analytics, housekeeping operations, and guest services, all secured via JWT-based authentication with role-based access control.
core_goals: Enable streamlined room and booking management with real-time updates and drag-and-drop functionalities.
Support multi-property management with detailed analytics and performance metrics.
Provide interactive tape chart views for occupancy and reservation tracking.
Facilitate operational tasks such as housekeeping scheduling and guest communication.
Ensure secure access with role-based authentication and maintain high system reliability.
Deliver real-time data visualization and updates to enhance administrative responsiveness.
key_features: Tape Chart Management: Interactive room management with drag-and-drop booking assignments, real-time occupancy status, and room block handling.
Room Management: Full CRUD operations for rooms, including status updates and configuration.
Booking System: Manage reservations, check-in/check-out workflows, and payment processing.
Multi-Property Manager: Oversee multiple hotel properties along with analytics dashboards for performance tracking.
Authentication System: Secure JWT-based user login and role-based access control.
Analytics Dashboard: Real-time reporting on occupancy rates, revenue metrics, and forecasting.
Housekeeping Management: Schedule cleaning tasks, assign duties, and monitor status.
Guest Services: Manage guest requests, room service orders, and interactive communication.
user_flow_summary: Administrator logs in using secure credentials and accesses the Tape Chart dashboard.
Admin navigates through multiple tabs including Tape Chart view, Room Blocks, Advanced Reservations, Assignment Rules, and Waitlist management.
Admin performs room assignments by dragging reservations onto rooms, creates and edits room blocks, and manages reservation details.
Housekeeping staff login to view tasks, schedules, and update cleaning statuses.
Front desk staff handle booking reservations, check-in/out processes, and payment processing.
Managers review analytics dashboards for occupancy and revenue insights across properties.
Guests use guest services to submit requests and communicate with hotel staff.
validation_criteria: All frontend components should load without errors including the 6 tabs in Tape Chart management.
Real-time data synchronization must be verified for room status updates and booking assignments.
Room blocks, advanced reservations, and assignment rules functionalities must be fully testable with CRUD operations.
Secure authentication with JWT and role-based access control should prevent unauthorized access.
API endpoints should respond correctly with expected data, verified by backend tests and curl commands.
UI must provide loading states, error handling, and success notifications for all user actions.
Performance tests for rendering large data and responsiveness on various device sizes must pass.
Accessibility requirements including ARIA labels and keyboard navigation must be implemented.
Real-time updates via WebSocket or equivalent technologies must function without requiring page refreshes.
